description_long: This object is a minimalist, geometric representation of a yacht, featuring a sharply faceted hull with clean, angular lines and a shallow, diamond-like profile. The hull is uniformly colored in a light beige or off-white tone, with no visible markings, windows, or decorative elements. The structure is monolithic, lacking any visible deck equipment, railings, or superstructure, and appears to be a single, continuous form. The top surface is flat and broad, tapering smoothly to a pointed bow and stern, while the sides descend in straight, planar facets to a narrow keel. There are no visible cabins, masts, or other appendages, giving the yacht a highly abstract and stylized appearance. The overall design suggests a focus on simplicity and modern aesthetics, with no functional details apparent.
description: A minimalist, faceted yacht with a flat, angular hull and no visible superstructure or details, rendered in a uniform light beige color.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, angular hull with a flat top and sharply tapered ends.
description_view_1: End view revealing the diamond-shaped cross-section and the pointed keel beneath the flat upper surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying the same elongated, faceted hull profile.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, with the same diamond-shaped cross-section and pointed keel.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a sharply faceted, angular design, featuring a flat upper surface and a diamond-shaped cross-section; no visible keels, chines, or markings; hull is uniformly beige.
attribute_deck_layout: No visible deck features, levels, cockpits, walkways, railings, or equipment; the top surface is flat and featureless.
attribute_cabin_structure: No visible cabin structure, windows, doors, or exterior features; the object appears as a single, solid hull.
